About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data reveals two exceptionally strong long-term performers dominating the rankings. CLMT ranks #1 with a composite score of 92.6, driven by consistent momentum across all timeframes (3.86% in 1 month to 956.78% over 10 years) and perfect positioning above all major moving averages. EACO ranks close behind with even more extreme 10-year returns of 1955.89% and 10-year outperformance versus SPY of 1694.13 percentage points, though its shorter-term momentum is weaker. Both stocks pass the ratio acceleration checks and show normal volatility, but CLMT's momentum signal is notably cleaner at -0.41 versus typical noise levels. The correlation patterns differ meaningfully—CLMT shows strength in energy (XLE +0.244) while weakness in tech (QQQ -0.173), suggesting these are secular winners outside the recent AI/tech rally. These appear to be rare outliers with decade-long compounding tracks records, not typical momentum plays.
